block_00: Your proof of address has expired
block_02: Please be informed that your proof of identity has expired. In order to avoid account limitation, we kindly ask you to upload one of the following documents on your account:
block_03: Utility bill (electricity, phone, water, internet, etc.);
block_04: Bank statement or letter regarding your bank account;
block_05: Tax bill from your tax authority;
block_06: Stamped residence certificate from your municipality.
block_07: The document to be uploaded must clearly show your full name, address, logo or stamp of the company/bank/municipality and the date of issue (not older than 6 months).
block_08: Please provide only full or half page copies of the document (cropped or blurry documents shall not be accepted).
block_09: We appreciate your cooperation in this matter and remain at your disposal.

block_14: Thank you for choosing our company!
